goal: Document the neutral Bluepilot review-suite entrypoint and the legacy Builder adapter compatibility command.
claims: BP-030 documents node tools/test-bluepilot-review-suite.cjs as the preferred shared suite.
BP-030 documents node tools/test-builder-adapter-review-suite.cjs as a legacy compatibility wrapper.
BP-030 does not change code, package metadata, runtime behavior, or external integration behavior.
assumptions: BP-029 already added the neutral suite and compatibility wrapper.
A short doc is enough to prevent future review command drift.
No package script is needed yet.
dod: The document names the preferred and legacy commands.
The document lists what the suite currently covers.
stop_conditions: Code or runtime changes become necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-029 introduced a neutral Bluepilot review-suite entrypoint and retained the Builder adapter suite as compatibility wrapper.
